name: Assault Time
description: 3D first person shooter game. Your mission is to explore the enemy base and take down all the guards. Shoot enemies, pick up first aid kits and earn money to purchase various upgrades.
instructions: Computer Arrow keys or W A S D to move the character Mouse to turn the character aim and shoot L to lock pointer R to reload P - pause Mobile Use on-screen joystick to move fire button to shoot tap and drag on right side of the screen to aim and
tags: 3D, 3D Games, Action, Android, Army, Boys, Bullet, Enemies, Gun, HTML5, iPhone, Killing, Mobile, Shooter
